mapper.update: /* TM_ME10001_Dao_saveMntmng */ MERGE INTO tm_me10001 A USING ( SELECT #{cntrctNo} AS cntrct_no, #{ecsSetcscDivCd} AS ecs_setcsc_div_cd, #{iemDivNm} AS iem_div_nm, #{iemDtlCtnt} AS iem_dtl_ctnt, #{frstRgstrId} AS frst_rgstr_id, #{lastUpdusrId} AS last_updusr_id, #{updtRsn} AS updt_rsn, #{lrgeChckAtchflNm} AS lrge_chck_atchfl_nm, #{lrgeChckAtchFlpth} AS lrge_chck_atch_flpth, #{dcompChckAtchflNm} AS dcomp_chck_atchfl_nm, #{dcompChckAtchFlpth} AS dcomp_chck_atch_flpth FROM DUAL ) B ON ( A.cntrct_no = B.cntrct_no ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.ecs_setcsc_div_cd = B.ecs_setcsc_div_cd, A.iem_div_nm = B.iem_div_nm, A.iem_dtl_ctnt = B.iem_dtl_ctnt, A.last_updt_dt = SYSDATE, A.last_updusr_id = B.last_updusr_id, A.updt_rsn = B.updt_rsn, A.lrge_chck_atchfl_nm = B.lrge_chck_atchfl_nm, A.lrge_chck_atch_flpth = B.lrge_chck_atch_flpth, A.dcomp_chck_atchfl_nm = B.dcomp_chck_atchfl_nm, A.dcomp_chck_atch_flpth = B.dcomp_chck_atch_flpth WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( A.cntrct_no, A.ecs_setcsc_div_cd, A.iem_div_nm, A.iem_dtl_ctnt, A.frst_regist_dt, A.frst_rgstr_id, A.last_updt_dt, A.last_updusr_id, A.updt_rsn, A.lrge_chck_atchfl_nm, A.lrge_chck_atch_flpth, A.dcomp_chck_atchfl_nm, A.dcomp_chck_atch_flpth ) VALUES ( B.cntrct_no, B.ecs_setcsc_div_cd, B.iem_div_nm, B.iem_dtl_ctnt, SYSDATE, B.frst_rgstr_id, SYSDATE, B.last_updusr_id, B.updt_rsn, B.lrge_chck_atchfl_nm, B.lrge_chck_atch_flpth, B.dcomp_chck_atchfl_nm, B.dcomp_chck_atch_flpth )
